meta.title: Medical Device Security: Uncomfortable Truths Require Uncomfortable Responses
meta.description:
Josh Corman of I Am The Cavalry and the Atlantic Council is deep into the medical device cybersecurity issue and dealing with the FDA, device vendors, providers, insurance companies and others to help dig out of this problem that he describes as uncomfortable truths.

At 19:00 Josh compares the MedSec/St. Jude disclosure and compares this to the J. Radcliffe/Johnson & Johnson disclosure. This is followed by what FDA has done and plans on doing in future.

The end of the session expands this beyond medical security and looks at other efforts in the government to secure ICS in other sectors.
